# ExtractMint

> ExtractMint is a browser-based document converter focused on turning bank statements and business documents into clean working files.

Website: https://extractmint.netlify.app/

## What ExtractMint Does

- Converts bank statement PDFs into spreadsheet-friendly rows.
- Exports Excel XLSX, CSV, Google Docs-ready DOCX, and PDF summaries.
- Handles text PDFs, DOCX files, spreadsheets, CSV, plain text, receipts, invoices, and images.
- Uses browser-side parsing in the current static implementation.
- Preserves transaction fields such as date, description, reference, withdrawal, deposit, tax, amount, category, and balance where available.

## Primary Use Cases

- Bank statement to Excel conversion.
- PDF bank statement to CSV conversion.
- Accountant and bookkeeper statement review.
- Founder/operator monthly reconciliation.
- Receipt, invoice, and office document extraction.

## Important Product Notes

- Text-based PDFs are the strongest input.
- Scanned statements rely on OCR and should be reviewed before export.
- Financial extraction should be validated against opening and closing balances before accounting use.
- The current app is a static browser-side prototype that can grow into a SaaS with accounts, credits, batch jobs, API access, audit logs, and server OCR.

## Key Pages

- Home and converter: https://extractmint.netlify.app/
- Bank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/bank-statement-to-excel/
- PDF bank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/pdf-bank-statement-to-excel/
- Scanned bank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/scanned-bank-statement-to-excel/
- CIMB bank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/cimb-bank-statement-to-excel/
- Maybank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/maybank-bank-statement-to-excel/
- Singapore bank statement to Excel: https://extractmint.netlify.app/convert/singapore-bank-statement-to-excel/
